subtasks.title: Configure Python development environment

subtasks.description: Build systems that allow coalitions to adapt to changing circumstances and requirements.
subtasks.details: Create mechanisms for dynamic role reassignment, goal reprioritization, and membership adjustment. Implement feedback loops that trigger coalition reconfiguration based on performance metrics, environmental changes, or new opportunities.

subtasks.title: Integrate all components into a unified system
subtasks.description: Combine all developed components into a cohesive system for coalition-based business operations.
subtasks.details: Create APIs and interfaces between all subsystems. Implement end-to-end workflows from opportunity detection through coalition formation, goal alignment, value creation, and distribution. Develop documentation and training materials for system users.

tasks.title: Implement Business Discovery System
tasks.description: Develop opportunity detection algorithms, value estimation models, coalition formation rules, and CrewAI adaptation for business creation.
tasks.details:
1. Implement opportunity detection algorithms
2. Create value estimation models
3. Develop coalition formation rules
4. Adapt CrewAI for business contexts
5. Implement business model templates
6. Create business validation mechanisms
7. Develop business metrics tracking
8. Implement customer satisfaction modeling
9. Create business visualization tools
10. Develop business evolution tracking
tasks.testStrategy:
1. Unit tests for opportunity detection with various scenarios
2. Validation of value estimation against known outcomes
3. Test coalition formation with different agent combinations
4. Performance benchmarks for business discovery
5. Integration tests with full agent ecosystem

subtasks.title: Define Business Discovery Algorithm Requirements
subtasks.description: Identify and document the specific requirements for business discovery algorithms, including data inputs, expected outputs, and performance metrics.
subtasks.details: Analyze the business context to determine what constitutes a valuable opportunity. Document required data sources, pattern recognition needs, and validation criteria. Create a specification document that outlines the algorithm's purpose, scope, and success criteria.

subtasks.title: Develop Core Business Opportunity Detection Algorithms
subtasks.description: Implement the core algorithms that can identify potential business opportunities from available data sources.
subtasks.details: Create pattern recognition algorithms that can identify market gaps, underserved customer segments, and potential business opportunities. Implement methods for clustering similar opportunities and filtering out low-potential leads.

subtasks.title: Design Value Estimation Model Framework
subtasks.description: Create a framework for estimating the potential value of identified business opportunities.
subtasks.details: Design a modular framework that can incorporate multiple valuation methods (DCF, comparable analysis, market-based approaches). Define the mathematical models and formulas for calculating potential ROI, market size, and growth projections.

subtasks.title: Implement Value Estimation Models
subtasks.description: Code the actual value estimation models based on the designed framework.
subtasks.details: Implement the mathematical models in code, including risk assessment calculations, confidence intervals, and sensitivity analysis. Create functions that can handle different types of business opportunities and adjust valuation methods accordingly.

subtasks.title: Analyze CrewAI Architecture for Business Adaptation
subtasks.description: Study the CrewAI framework to identify components that need modification for business contexts.
subtasks.details: Review CrewAI documentation and codebase to understand its architecture, agent communication protocols, and task allocation mechanisms. Identify specific components that need to be extended or modified to support business discovery and valuation tasks.

subtasks.title: Extend CrewAI Agent Capabilities for Business Tasks
subtasks.description: Modify or extend CrewAI agents to handle business-specific tasks and reasoning.
subtasks.details: Implement business domain knowledge into agent reasoning capabilities. Add methods for market analysis, competitive assessment, and business strategy evaluation. Create specialized agent roles like Market Analyst, Financial Modeler, and Strategy Advisor.

subtasks.title: Integrate Discovery Algorithms with CrewAI
subtasks.description: Connect the business discovery algorithms with the adapted CrewAI framework.
subtasks.details: Create interfaces between the discovery algorithms and CrewAI agents. Implement task definitions that allow agents to trigger algorithm execution and process results. Ensure proper data flow between components.

subtasks.title: Integrate Value Estimation Models with CrewAI
subtasks.description: Connect the value estimation models with the adapted CrewAI framework.
subtasks.details: Develop interfaces for agents to access and utilize value estimation models. Create mechanisms for agents to provide context and parameters to the models and interpret the results. Implement feedback loops for refining estimates based on additional information.

subtasks.title: Develop Testing Framework for Business Algorithms
subtasks.description: Create a comprehensive testing framework to validate the business discovery and valuation algorithms.
subtasks.details: Implement unit tests for individual algorithm components. Create integration tests for the entire system. Develop benchmark datasets with known opportunities and valuations to measure algorithm performance. Design validation metrics to assess accuracy and reliability.

subtasks.title: Optimize and Refine the Integrated System
subtasks.description: Analyze performance bottlenecks and refine the integrated system for improved accuracy and efficiency.
subtasks.details: Profile the system to identify performance bottlenecks. Optimize algorithms for speed and resource efficiency. Refine models based on testing results to improve accuracy. Document the final architecture and provide usage examples for different business scenarios.

tasks.title: Implement DuckDB Analytics Integration

subtasks.title: Set up DuckDB environment
subtasks.description: Install and configure DuckDB for the project, including necessary extensions and initial database structure.
subtasks.details: Install DuckDB library, set up connection parameters, configure memory settings, and establish the database schema that will support the analytics requirements. Test the installation with basic queries to ensure proper functionality.

subtasks.title: Design data ingestion pipeline
subtasks.description: Create a system to continuously import data into DuckDB for real-time analytics processing.
subtasks.details: Implement data connectors for relevant sources, establish streaming or batch import processes, set up data validation and cleaning procedures, and ensure proper timestamp handling for real-time analytics capabilities.

subtasks.title: Implement core analytics queries
subtasks.description: Develop the fundamental SQL queries that will power the analytics functionality.
subtasks.details: Create optimized SQL queries for common analytics patterns, implement aggregation functions, design time-series analysis capabilities, and establish query templates that can be parameterized for different use cases.

subtasks.title: Build real-time processing framework
subtasks.description: Develop the infrastructure to execute analytics queries as new data arrives.
subtasks.details: Implement trigger mechanisms for query execution, create caching strategies for intermediate results, establish update policies for real-time dashboards, and optimize for minimal latency between data arrival and insight generation.

subtasks.title: Create custom query builder interface
subtasks.description: Develop a user interface that allows non-technical users to construct custom analytics queries.
subtasks.details: Design an intuitive query building UI, implement drag-and-drop functionality for query components, create a query validation system, and provide query templates for common analytics scenarios.

subtasks.title: Implement data visualization components
subtasks.description: Develop reusable visualization tools that can represent the analytics results graphically.
subtasks.details: Create chart and graph components (line, bar, scatter, etc.), implement interactive features like zooming and filtering, establish color schemes and styling, and ensure responsive design for different screen sizes.

subtasks.title: Integrate visualization with real-time data
subtasks.description: Connect the visualization components to the real-time data processing system.
subtasks.details: Implement WebSocket or similar technology for pushing updates to visualizations, create animation transitions for changing data, establish update frequency controls, and optimize rendering performance for continuous updates.

subtasks.title: Develop comprehensive analytics dashboard
subtasks.description: Create a unified dashboard that combines custom queries and visualizations into a cohesive analytics platform.
subtasks.details: Design dashboard layout and navigation, implement user preferences and saved views, create export functionality for reports, add alerting capabilities for significant data patterns, and ensure proper user authentication and authorization for analytics access.

tasks.title: Implement Demo Scenarios

subtasks.title: Define Demo Scenario Requirements
subtasks.description: Document the requirements for each demo scenario, including objectives, target audience, and key features to showcase.
subtasks.details: Create a comprehensive document outlining what each demo scenario should demonstrate, the technical capabilities to highlight, and the expected outcomes. Include user personas and use cases for each scenario.

subtasks.title: Design Scenario Management System Architecture
subtasks.description: Create the technical architecture for the scenario management system that will control the flow and execution of demos.
subtasks.details: Design a flexible architecture that allows for scenario creation, modification, and execution. Include components for scenario storage, loading, execution control, and state management. Create UML diagrams showing the system structure.

subtasks.title: Implement Core Scenario Management Components
subtasks.description: Develop the foundational components of the scenario management system based on the architecture design.
subtasks.details: Code the core classes and interfaces for scenario representation, loading mechanisms, execution engine, and state tracking. Implement the scenario lifecycle management from initialization to completion.

subtasks.title: Develop Visualization Framework
subtasks.description: Create a visualization framework that will render the demo scenarios in an engaging and informative way.
subtasks.details: Implement visualization tools that can represent system states, data flows, and interactions. Include support for different visualization types (charts, graphs, animations) and ensure they can be dynamically updated during scenario execution.

subtasks.title: Design Metrics Collection and Tracking System
subtasks.description: Design a system to collect, process, and display relevant metrics during demo execution.
subtasks.details: Create a metrics framework that can track performance indicators, user interactions, and system behaviors during demos. Design dashboards for real-time metrics visualization and historical comparison.

subtasks.title: Implement First Demo Scenario
subtasks.description: Develop the first complete demo scenario using the management system and visualization tools.
subtasks.details: Implement a fully functional demo scenario that showcases core system capabilities. Include scenario setup, execution flow, interactive elements, visualization components, and metrics tracking.

subtasks.title: Create Scenario Transition and Navigation System
subtasks.description: Implement functionality to smoothly transition between different demo scenarios and navigate within scenarios.
subtasks.details: Develop controls for moving between scenarios, rewinding, fast-forwarding, and jumping to specific points in a demonstration. Ensure state is properly preserved and restored during transitions.

subtasks.title: Implement Remaining Demo Scenarios
subtasks.description: Develop the complete set of demo scenarios based on the requirements document.
subtasks.details: Code all remaining demo scenarios, ensuring they effectively demonstrate different aspects of the system. Each scenario should have appropriate visualizations, metrics tracking, and interactive elements.

subtasks.title: Develop Demo Scenario Documentation and Guides
subtasks.description: Create comprehensive documentation for each demo scenario, including setup instructions and presentation guides.
subtasks.details: Document each scenario's purpose, setup requirements, execution flow, and key points to emphasize during presentations. Include troubleshooting information and FAQs for presenters.

subtasks.title: Test and Optimize Demo Performance
subtasks.description: Conduct thorough testing of all demo scenarios and optimize for performance and reliability.
subtasks.details: Test each scenario under various conditions, identify and fix bugs, and optimize performance. Ensure smooth execution on target hardware, with special attention to visualization rendering and transition performance.

tasks.title: Implement Hardware Abstraction Layer
tasks.description: Develop the edge device abstraction layer, resource constraint simulation, and offline operation capabilities for hardware deployment.
tasks.details:
1. Create edge device abstraction layer
2. Implement device capability detection
3. Develop resource constraint simulation
4. Create offline operation capabilities
5. Implement state synchronization mechanisms
6. Develop hardware-specific optimizations
7. Create deployment configuration system

10. Create hardware visualization tools
tasks.testStrategy:

2. Validation of resource constraint handling

subtasks.title: Define HAL architecture and interfaces
subtasks.description: Design the overall architecture of the Hardware Abstraction Layer (HAL) including core interfaces, component relationships, and abstraction boundaries.
subtasks.details: Create architectural diagrams showing the HAL's position between application and hardware layers. Define primary interfaces for device access, capability querying, and resource management. Establish design patterns for hardware abstraction that will be used throughout the implementation.

subtasks.title: Implement device discovery mechanism
subtasks.description: Create a system to automatically detect and enumerate available hardware devices and peripherals.
subtasks.details: Develop platform-specific device enumeration for common hardware (GPU, CPU, memory, sensors, etc.). Implement a unified discovery API that works across platforms. Include mechanisms to handle hot-plugging and device removal events.

subtasks.title: Develop capability detection framework
subtasks.description: Build a framework to query and report detailed hardware capabilities and limitations.
subtasks.details: Create capability profiles for different hardware types. Implement benchmarking utilities to measure actual performance characteristics. Design a capability database structure to store and query device features. Include version detection for drivers and firmware.

subtasks.title: Create resource allocation system
subtasks.description: Implement a system to manage hardware resource allocation, sharing, and prioritization.
subtasks.details: Design resource allocation algorithms that optimize for different priorities (performance, power, etc.). Implement resource locking and synchronization mechanisms. Create APIs for requesting and releasing resources. Include conflict resolution for competing resource requests.

subtasks.title: Implement hardware simulation layer
subtasks.description: Develop a simulation layer that can emulate hardware for testing and fallback scenarios.
subtasks.details: Create software implementations of hardware functions. Implement configurable performance throttling to simulate different hardware capabilities. Design a plugin system for specialized hardware simulators. Include latency and error simulation for realistic testing.

subtasks.title: Build offline operation capabilities
subtasks.description: Develop mechanisms for graceful degradation and continued operation when hardware becomes unavailable.
subtasks.details: Implement state persistence for interrupted operations. Create work queuing systems for delayed processing when hardware becomes available. Design fallback pathways for critical operations. Include notification systems for offline mode transitions.

subtasks.title: Develop hardware abstraction APIs
subtasks.description: Create unified programming interfaces that abstract hardware-specific details.
subtasks.details: Design consistent APIs for common hardware operations. Implement adapter patterns for translating between HAL and hardware-specific interfaces. Create documentation and examples for each API. Include versioning strategy for API evolution.

subtasks.title: Implement performance monitoring and optimization
subtasks.description: Create systems to monitor hardware performance and automatically optimize resource usage.
subtasks.details: Develop performance metrics collection for hardware operations. Implement adaptive optimization based on usage patterns. Create visualization tools for performance analysis. Design throttling mechanisms to prevent resource exhaustion.

subtasks.title: Create comprehensive testing framework
subtasks.description: Build a testing system to verify HAL functionality across different hardware configurations.
subtasks.details: Implement unit tests for all HAL components. Create integration tests for hardware interactions. Design simulation-based tests for edge cases and error conditions. Develop performance benchmarks to validate optimization effectiveness.

subtasks.title: Develop documentation and examples
subtasks.description: Create comprehensive documentation and example code for using the HAL.
subtasks.details: Write API reference documentation with usage examples. Create tutorials for common integration scenarios. Develop sample applications demonstrating HAL features. Include troubleshooting guides and performance optimization recommendations.

tasks.title: Implement Local LLM Integration
tasks.description: Develop the Ollama/llama-cpp integration for edge devices, with model quantization, fallback strategies, and memory optimization.
tasks.details:
1. Create Ollama wrapper for local operation
2. Implement llama-cpp integration
3. Develop model quantization techniques
4. Create fallback strategies between models
5. Implement memory optimization for edge devices
6. Develop model caching mechanisms
7. Create model download and update system
8. Implement model performance monitoring
9. Develop model selection based on hardware capabilities
10. Create model visualization tools
tasks.testStrategy:
1. Unit tests for local LLM operations
2. Validation of model quantization quality
3. Test fallback strategies with simulated failures
4. Performance benchmarks on target hardware (Raspberry Pi 4B)
5. Integration tests with agent communication system

subtasks.title: Research and select appropriate LLM models for edge devices
subtasks.description: Evaluate various small-footprint LLMs suitable for edge deployment, considering size, performance, and hardware requirements.
subtasks.details: Compare models like Llama-2-7B, Phi-2, Mistral-7B, and other edge-optimized models. Document performance benchmarks, memory requirements, and inference speeds on target hardware. Create a comparison matrix with pros/cons of each model.

subtasks.title: Implement model quantization pipeline
subtasks.description: Develop a pipeline for quantizing selected LLMs to reduce memory footprint while maintaining acceptable performance.
subtasks.details: Implement 4-bit, 8-bit quantization techniques using libraries like GGML or llama.cpp. Evaluate INT4, INT8, and mixed precision approaches. Document quantization impact on model performance and size reduction.

subtasks.title: Optimize memory usage for inference
subtasks.description: Implement memory optimization techniques to reduce RAM requirements during model inference.
subtasks.details: Implement techniques like attention caching, KV cache optimization, and sliding window attention. Measure and document memory usage before and after optimizations. Target maximum efficiency on devices with 2-8GB RAM.

subtasks.title: Develop model pruning strategy
subtasks.description: Research and implement model pruning techniques to remove unnecessary weights and further reduce model size.
subtasks.details: Implement structured and unstructured pruning methods. Evaluate impact on model performance at different pruning levels (10%, 20%, 30%). Create automated pruning scripts with configurable thresholds.

subtasks.title: Create hardware-specific optimizations
subtasks.description: Develop optimizations for specific edge hardware targets (CPU, GPU, NPU).
subtasks.details: Implement SIMD instructions for CPU, optimize for mobile GPUs, and leverage neural processing units where available. Create separate optimization profiles for different hardware configurations. Benchmark performance across devices.

subtasks.title: Implement model caching and persistence
subtasks.description: Develop a system for caching model states and persisting them to disk to optimize cold start times.
subtasks.details: Create a caching mechanism for model weights and intermediate states. Implement efficient serialization/deserialization. Measure and optimize cold start and warm inference times.

subtasks.title: Design and implement fallback strategy
subtasks.description: Create a robust fallback system that gracefully degrades performance when resource constraints are encountered.
subtasks.details: Implement tiered model loading (smallest to largest based on available resources). Create automatic fallback to smaller models or cloud APIs when local inference fails. Design error handling and retry mechanisms.

subtasks.title: Develop dynamic resource management
subtasks.description: Create a system to monitor and dynamically adjust resource usage based on device conditions.
subtasks.details: Implement real-time monitoring of CPU, memory, and battery usage. Create adaptive inference parameters that adjust based on resource availability. Develop power-saving modes for low-battery situations.

subtasks.title: Create comprehensive testing framework
subtasks.description: Develop a testing framework to evaluate model performance, resource usage, and reliability across different devices.
subtasks.details: Create automated test suites for performance benchmarking, memory profiling, and accuracy testing. Implement stress tests for resource-constrained scenarios. Develop CI/CD pipeline for continuous testing across device profiles.

subtasks.title: Document integration API and deployment guidelines
subtasks.description: Create comprehensive documentation for integrating optimized LLMs into applications and guidelines for deployment.
subtasks.details: Document API interfaces, configuration options, and integration patterns. Create deployment guides for different hardware targets. Include troubleshooting section and performance optimization tips. Provide sample code for common use cases.

subtasks.title: Define state serialization requirements
subtasks.description: Identify and document all state data that needs to be serialized for coalition packaging
subtasks.details: Create a comprehensive list of all state components that need serialization, including agent states, shared knowledge, communication channels, and environmental context. Document the data types, structures, and relationships that must be preserved during serialization.

subtasks.title: Design serialization format and protocol
subtasks.description: Create a standardized format and protocol for serializing coalition state data
subtasks.details: Design a serialization schema that supports versioning, is language-agnostic, and optimized for coalition data. Consider formats like Protocol Buffers, JSON, or custom binary formats. Include validation mechanisms and error handling procedures.

subtasks.title: Implement core serialization functions
subtasks.description: Develop the core functions for serializing and deserializing coalition state
subtasks.details: Code the serialization and deserialization functions according to the designed protocol. Ensure proper handling of complex data structures, circular references, and type safety. Include unit tests to verify correctness of serialization/deserialization.

subtasks.title: Research knowledge compression algorithms
subtasks.description: Evaluate and select appropriate compression algorithms for coalition knowledge
subtasks.details: Research compression techniques suitable for the types of knowledge present in coalitions. Compare algorithms based on compression ratio, speed, and preservation of semantic relationships. Document findings and recommendations with benchmarks.

subtasks.title: Develop knowledge compression pipeline
subtasks.description: Create a pipeline for compressing and decompressing coalition knowledge
subtasks.details: Implement the selected compression algorithms into a pipeline that can process serialized coalition knowledge. Include pre-processing steps, compression stages, and post-processing. Ensure the pipeline maintains knowledge integrity and relationships.

subtasks.title: Create deployment configuration schema
subtasks.description: Design a schema for deployment configurations that supports various environments
subtasks.details: Define a configuration schema that captures all necessary deployment parameters including resource requirements, networking, security policies, and environment variables. Ensure the schema is extensible and supports different deployment targets (cloud, edge, on-premise).

subtasks.title: Implement deployment configuration generator
subtasks.description: Develop a tool that generates deployment configurations based on coalition requirements
subtasks.details: Create a generator that analyzes coalition requirements and produces appropriate deployment configurations. Include logic for resource optimization, security hardening, and environment-specific adaptations. Support multiple output formats (Kubernetes YAML, Docker Compose, etc.).

subtasks.title: Integrate serialization, compression, and configuration generation
subtasks.description: Combine the three components into a unified coalition packaging system
subtasks.details: Integrate the serialization, compression, and configuration generation components into a cohesive system. Develop interfaces between components, ensure proper data flow, and implement error handling across component boundaries.

subtasks.title: Develop validation and verification tools
subtasks.description: Create tools to validate and verify packaged coalitions
subtasks.details: Implement validation tools that can verify the integrity and correctness of packaged coalitions. Include checks for serialization errors, knowledge corruption, and configuration validity. Create reporting mechanisms for validation results.

subtasks.title: Create documentation and usage examples
subtasks.description: Document the coalition packaging system and provide usage examples
subtasks.details: Develop comprehensive documentation covering the architecture, APIs, and usage patterns of the coalition packaging system. Include troubleshooting guides, performance considerations, and examples for common scenarios. Create tutorials for different use cases.

subtasks.title: Define minimal Python environment requirements
subtasks.description: Identify the core Python packages and dependencies needed for the edge runtime to function properly while maintaining a small footprint.
subtasks.details: Research and document the minimum Python version required, essential standard library modules, and third-party packages. Consider size constraints and compatibility with target platforms. Create a requirements.txt file with pinned versions.

subtasks.title: Design the runtime architecture
subtasks.description: Create a high-level design document for the edge runtime architecture, including component interactions and data flow.
subtasks.details: Define the core components (scheduler, message broker, plugin system, etc.), their responsibilities, and how they interact. Include diagrams showing the architecture and data flow. Consider resource constraints of edge devices.

subtasks.title: Implement core runtime initialization
subtasks.description: Develop the bootstrap process that initializes the runtime environment and loads configuration.
subtasks.details: Create the main entry point that handles environment setup, configuration loading, logging initialization, and error handling. Implement graceful startup and shutdown procedures.

subtasks.title: Develop configuration management system
subtasks.description: Create a flexible configuration system that supports different platforms and deployment scenarios.
subtasks.details: Implement configuration loading from multiple sources (files, environment variables, command line). Support different formats (JSON, YAML, etc.). Include validation and default values. Design for extensibility across platforms.

subtasks.title: Implement platform detection and adaptation
subtasks.description: Create a system to detect the underlying platform and adapt runtime behavior accordingly.
subtasks.details: Develop platform detection for major OS types (Linux, Windows, macOS) and hardware architectures. Implement platform-specific optimizations and workarounds. Create an abstraction layer for platform-dependent operations.

subtasks.title: Build service management subsystem
subtasks.description: Implement the component that handles service lifecycle (start, stop, restart) and registration.
subtasks.details: Create service wrapper classes for different platforms (systemd, Windows services, etc.). Implement service registration, dependency management, and health monitoring. Support automatic restart on failure.

subtasks.title: Develop update mechanism framework
subtasks.description: Create a secure and reliable system for receiving and applying runtime updates.
subtasks.details: Implement update package format, verification (signatures), and staged deployment. Design rollback capabilities for failed updates. Create platform-specific update procedures. Include logging and telemetry for update operations.

subtasks.title: Implement resource monitoring and constraints
subtasks.description: Build a system to monitor and manage resource usage (CPU, memory, disk, network) on edge devices.
subtasks.details: Create resource monitoring for different platforms. Implement throttling and constraints to prevent resource exhaustion. Add alerting for resource issues. Design adaptive behavior based on available resources.

subtasks.title: Create comprehensive error handling system
subtasks.description: Develop a robust error handling framework that can gracefully manage failures in the edge environment.
subtasks.details: Implement structured error types, logging, and reporting. Create recovery strategies for different failure scenarios. Design circuit breakers for external dependencies. Include offline operation capabilities during connectivity issues.

subtasks.title: Develop testing framework and documentation
subtasks.description: Create a comprehensive testing strategy and documentation for the edge runtime.
subtasks.details: Implement unit tests, integration tests, and platform-specific tests. Create documentation for deployment, configuration, and troubleshooting. Develop examples and tutorials for common use cases. Include performance benchmarks and optimization guidelines.

subtasks.title: Create Infrastructure as Code (IaC) Templates

subtasks.details: Select IaC tool (e.g., Terraform, CloudFormation), create templates for all required infrastructure components, implement environment-specific configurations, and ensure templates are modular and reusable.

subtasks.title: Implement Automated Environment Provisioning

subtasks.title: Develop Deployment Automation Scripts

subtasks.details: Develop deployment scripts, implement blue-green or canary deployment strategies, create rollback mechanisms, and ensure proper handling of database migrations and configuration updates.

subtasks.title: Implement Continuous Deployment Pipeline
subtasks.description: Set up the CD pipeline for automated deployments to multiple environments
subtasks.details: Configure deployment pipelines for each environment, implement approval gates between environments, set up automated smoke tests post-deployment, and ensure proper environment promotion workflow.

subtasks.title: Set Up Monitoring and Alerting
subtasks.description: Implement monitoring and alerting for the CI/CD pipeline and deployments
subtasks.details: Integrate monitoring tools, set up pipeline performance metrics, configure deployment success/failure alerts, implement logging for all pipeline stages, and create dashboards for pipeline visibility.

subtasks.title: Implement Security Scanning and Compliance Checks
subtasks.description: Add security scanning and compliance validation to the pipeline
subtasks.details: Integrate security scanning tools (SAST, DAST, SCA), implement compliance checks, set up vulnerability reporting, configure security gates, and ensure proper handling of security findings.

subtasks.title: Document and Train Team on CI/CD Processes

3. Test alert system with simulated incidents
4. Performance impact assessment of security measures
5. Compliance verification with security standards

subtasks.title: Define monitoring metrics and collection strategy
subtasks.description: Identify key metrics to monitor across the system and define how they will be collected
subtasks.details: Create a comprehensive list of metrics to track system health, performance, and security events. Include CPU/memory usage, request latency, error rates, login attempts, and resource access patterns. Define collection frequency and storage requirements.

subtasks.title: Implement metrics collection infrastructure
subtasks.description: Build the technical infrastructure to collect and store metrics from all system components
subtasks.details: Develop a metrics collection service that can receive data from all system components. Implement appropriate data storage solutions (time-series database) and ensure minimal performance impact on the main application.

subtasks.title: Design and implement authentication system
subtasks.description: Create a robust authentication system with multi-factor capabilities
subtasks.details: Implement a secure authentication system supporting username/password, OAuth, and multi-factor authentication. Include account lockout policies, password complexity requirements, and secure credential storage using industry-standard hashing algorithms.

subtasks.title: Develop encryption framework for data at rest
subtasks.description: Implement encryption for all sensitive data stored in the system
subtasks.details: Create an encryption framework that secures all sensitive data at rest. Select appropriate encryption algorithms (AES-256), implement key management, and ensure the system can efficiently encrypt/decrypt data without significant performance penalties.

subtasks.title: Implement secure communication channels
subtasks.description: Ensure all data in transit is encrypted and secure
subtasks.details: Configure TLS for all external communications. Implement secure internal communication channels between microservices using mutual TLS or similar technology. Ensure proper certificate management and rotation procedures.

subtasks.title: Design and implement security policy framework
subtasks.description: Create a flexible framework for defining and enforcing security policies
subtasks.details: Develop a policy definition language or configuration system that allows specifying access controls, data handling requirements, and security constraints. Include policy validation and conflict resolution mechanisms.

subtasks.title: Implement real-time security monitoring and alerting
subtasks.description: Create a system to detect and alert on potential security incidents
subtasks.details: Develop monitoring rules to detect suspicious activities (unusual login patterns, access attempts, data exfiltration). Implement real-time alerting via multiple channels (email, SMS, dashboard) with appropriate severity levels.

subtasks.title: Develop security audit logging system
subtasks.description: Implement comprehensive logging of all security-relevant events
subtasks.details: Create a secure audit logging system that captures all authentication events, policy changes, access control decisions, and sensitive data operations. Ensure logs are tamper-evident and stored securely with appropriate retention policies.

subtasks.title: Implement automated security testing
subtasks.description: Create automated tests to verify security controls are functioning correctly
subtasks.details: Develop automated tests that verify authentication, encryption, and policy enforcement are working correctly. Include penetration testing scenarios and security regression tests that can be run as part of the CI/CD pipeline.

subtasks.title: Create security and monitoring documentation
subtasks.description: Document all security and monitoring features for users and administrators
subtasks.details: Create comprehensive documentation covering security architecture, monitoring capabilities, configuration options, and incident response procedures. Include both technical documentation for administrators and appropriate user-facing security guidance.

tasks.title: Implement Demo Polish
tasks.description: Optimize investor flow, implement failure recovery, ensure mobile responsiveness, and create performance showcases for demonstrations.
tasks.details:
1. Optimize investor demonstration flow
2. Implement failure recovery for demos
3. Ensure mobile responsiveness for all interfaces
4. Create performance showcases for key features
5. Develop guided tour functionality
6. Implement demo reset capabilities
7. Create demo metrics tracking
8. Develop demo customization options
9. Implement demo recording and playback
10. Create demo documentation generation
tasks.testStrategy:
1. User acceptance testing with sample investors
2. Validation of failure recovery with simulated errors
3. Test mobile interfaces on various devices
4. Performance benchmarks for showcase scenarios
5. Usability testing with non-technical users

subtasks.title: Analyze current investor demo flow
subtasks.description: Review and document the existing investor demo flow to identify pain points and opportunities for optimization.
subtasks.details: Create a detailed map of the current demo flow, including all steps, transitions, and potential failure points. Document user feedback and observations from previous demos. Identify areas where the demo feels disjointed or where investors commonly have questions.

subtasks.title: Design optimized demo flow
subtasks.description: Create a streamlined and compelling investor demo flow that highlights key product strengths.
subtasks.details: Develop a narrative structure for the demo that tells a cohesive story about the product. Ensure the flow emphasizes unique selling points and addresses common investor questions. Create wireframes or storyboards for the optimized flow.

subtasks.title: Implement failure recovery mechanisms
subtasks.description: Develop robust error handling and recovery processes for the demo to ensure smooth presentations even when issues occur.
subtasks.details: Identify common failure points in the demo. Implement graceful error handling for network issues, data loading problems, and other potential failures. Create backup paths and alternative flows that can be used if primary demo components fail.

subtasks.title: Create performance showcase segments
subtasks.description: Develop specific demo segments that highlight the system's performance capabilities and technical advantages.
subtasks.details: Identify 3-5 key performance metrics that would impress investors. Design visual representations of these metrics (charts, comparisons, etc.). Create scripted segments that demonstrate these performance advantages in a compelling way.

subtasks.title: Develop demo script and talking points
subtasks.description: Create a comprehensive script with key talking points for the optimized investor demo.
subtasks.details: Write a detailed script that guides presenters through the demo flow. Include key talking points, transitions between segments, and responses to common questions. Ensure the script emphasizes the product's value proposition and investment potential.

subtasks.title: Build automated demo environment
subtasks.description: Create a controlled, reproducible environment for running the investor demo with minimal manual setup.
subtasks.details: Develop scripts or tools to automatically set up the demo environment. Implement data preloading and state management to ensure consistent demo experiences. Create a simple interface for demo operators to control the flow and recover from issues.

subtasks.title: Conduct internal demo rehearsals
subtasks.description: Run multiple rehearsals of the investor demo with internal stakeholders to identify and address issues.
subtasks.details: Schedule at least 3 rehearsal sessions with different internal audiences. Document all feedback and issues encountered during rehearsals. Iterate on the demo flow, script, and recovery mechanisms based on rehearsal findings.

subtasks.title: Finalize and document demo process
subtasks.description: Create comprehensive documentation for the optimized demo process and train all potential presenters.
subtasks.details: Develop a demo playbook that includes the final script, setup instructions, and troubleshooting guides. Create a quick reference guide for presenters with key talking points and recovery procedures. Conduct training sessions for all team members who might present to investors.

tasks.title: Create Comprehensive Test Suite
tasks.description: Develop end-to-end test suite, security penetration testing, load testing with 100+ agents, and investor demo validation.
tasks.details:
1. Create end-to-end test suite covering all components
2. Implement security penetration testing
3. Develop load testing with 100+ agents
4. Create investor demo validation tests
5. Implement performance regression testing
6. Develop cross-platform compatibility tests
7. Create edge device specific tests
8. Implement long-running stability tests
9. Develop test reporting and visualization
10. Create test documentation generation
tasks.testStrategy:
1. Automated execution of all test suites
2. Validation of test coverage (95% target)
3. Test reporting and failure analysis
4. Performance benchmarking across all tests
5. Regular execution in CI/CD pipeline

subtasks.title: Define Test Strategy and Framework
subtasks.description: Create a comprehensive test strategy document outlining the approach, tools, and frameworks to be used for all testing types.
subtasks.details: Document should include test objectives, scope, testing levels, entry/exit criteria, resource requirements, timeline, and risk assessment. Select appropriate testing frameworks for each test type (end-to-end, security, load, etc.).

subtasks.title: Set Up Test Environment
subtasks.description: Establish isolated test environments that mirror production for conducting various types of tests.
subtasks.details: Configure development, staging, and pre-production environments. Ensure data isolation, appropriate network configurations, and necessary monitoring tools. Document environment setup procedures for team reference.

subtasks.title: Develop End-to-End Test Cases
subtasks.description: Create detailed test cases covering all critical user journeys through the application.
subtasks.details: Identify key user flows, create test scenarios with expected outcomes, develop automated scripts using the selected framework. Focus on user registration, authentication, core functionality, and edge cases.

subtasks.title: Implement Security Testing Plan
subtasks.description: Develop and implement a comprehensive security testing strategy including penetration testing, vulnerability scanning, and authentication testing.
subtasks.details: Include OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities, API security testing, data encryption verification, session management, and access control testing. Document all security test cases and procedures.

subtasks.title: Design Load and Performance Tests
subtasks.description: Create load testing scenarios to verify system performance under expected and peak loads.
subtasks.details: Define performance metrics and thresholds, create test scripts for simulating various load conditions, establish baseline performance metrics, and design stress tests to identify breaking points.

subtasks.title: Develop Automated Test Suite
subtasks.description: Build an automated test suite that can be integrated with CI/CD pipeline for continuous testing.
subtasks.details: Implement test automation framework, create reusable test components, develop test data management strategy, and integrate with CI/CD tools. Ensure tests can run headlessly and generate comprehensive reports.

subtasks.title: Create Investor Demo Validation Tests
subtasks.description: Develop specific test scenarios that validate features and functionality important for investor demonstrations.
subtasks.details: Identify key features that showcase business value, create polished user journeys that highlight system capabilities, develop visual validation tests, and ensure consistent performance during demos.

subtasks.title: Implement Test Data Management
subtasks.description: Create a strategy for generating, managing, and refreshing test data across all test environments.
subtasks.details: Develop data generation scripts, implement data masking for sensitive information, create data reset mechanisms, and document data requirements for each test type.

subtasks.title: Conduct Integration Testing
subtasks.description: Develop and execute tests that verify the correct interaction between different system components and external services.
subtasks.details: Identify all integration points, create test cases for API interactions, third-party service integrations, database operations, and error handling scenarios.

subtasks.title: Create Test Documentation and Reporting System
subtasks.description: Develop comprehensive test documentation and implement a reporting system to track test results and metrics.
subtasks.details: Create test plan documents, test case repositories, automated test reports, defect tracking procedures, and test coverage metrics. Implement dashboards for visualizing test results and progress.

tasks.title: Create Documentation Suite
tasks.description: Develop API documentation, architecture guides, video tutorials, and troubleshooting guides for the entire system.
tasks.details:
1. Create comprehensive API documentation
2. Develop architecture guides for all components
3. Create video tutorials for key features
4. Implement troubleshooting guides
5. Develop user manuals for different user types
6. Create developer onboarding documentation
7. Implement documentation search and navigation
8. Create documentation versioning
9. Develop interactive examples and demos
10. Implement documentation feedback system
tasks.testStrategy:
1. Documentation review by different stakeholders
2. Validation of examples and code snippets
3. Test documentation search functionality
4. Usability testing with new users
5. Regular updates based on user feedback

subtasks.title: Conduct Documentation Needs Assessment
subtasks.description: Analyze the current system and identify all areas requiring documentation, including APIs, architecture, user workflows, and common issues.
subtasks.details: Interview stakeholders to understand documentation gaps, review existing materials, identify target audiences (developers, end users, administrators), and create a documentation requirements matrix mapping content types to user needs.

subtasks.title: Create Documentation Plan and Style Guide
subtasks.description: Develop a comprehensive documentation plan with timelines, responsibilities, and a style guide for consistency across all documentation.
subtasks.details: Define documentation structure, establish writing standards (tone, formatting, terminology), create templates for different doc types, set up version control for documentation, and determine review processes.

subtasks.title: Develop API Documentation
subtasks.description: Create detailed API documentation including endpoints, parameters, request/response examples, and authentication methods.
subtasks.details: Use tools like Swagger/OpenAPI, document all endpoints with descriptions, parameters, response codes, include code samples in multiple languages, create interactive API playground if possible, and document rate limits and best practices.

subtasks.title: Create System Architecture Documentation
subtasks.description: Document the overall system architecture, including component diagrams, data flows, and infrastructure details.
subtasks.details: Create high-level architecture diagrams, document component interactions, detail deployment environments, include database schemas, document security architecture, and explain scaling considerations.

subtasks.title: Develop User Guides and Tutorials
subtasks.description: Create step-by-step guides for common user workflows and tasks within the system.
subtasks.details: Identify key user journeys, create task-based documentation with screenshots, develop quick-start guides for new users, include tips and best practices, and create printable/downloadable versions.

subtasks.title: Produce Video Tutorials
subtasks.description: Create instructional videos demonstrating key features and common workflows.
subtasks.details: Develop video scripts based on user guides, record screen captures with narration, create intro/outro templates, edit videos for clarity and conciseness, add captions for accessibility, and organize into a logical sequence or playlist.

subtasks.title: Develop Troubleshooting and FAQ Documentation
subtasks.description: Create comprehensive troubleshooting guides and FAQs addressing common issues and their solutions.
subtasks.details: Collect common issues from support tickets, develop decision trees for problem diagnosis, document error codes and messages, create step-by-step resolution guides, and organize by system component or user role.

subtasks.title: Implement Documentation Portal/Website
subtasks.description: Set up a centralized documentation portal with search functionality, version control, and organized navigation.
subtasks.details: Select documentation platform (e.g., GitBook, Docusaurus, Confluence), implement search functionality, create logical information architecture, ensure mobile responsiveness, and set up analytics to track documentation usage.

subtasks.title: Conduct Documentation Review and Testing
subtasks.description: Review all documentation for accuracy, completeness, and usability through peer reviews and user testing.
subtasks.details: Organize technical review by subject matter experts, conduct usability testing with target audiences, check for consistency with style guide, verify all links and references, and ensure documentation works across different devices and browsers.

subtasks.title: Establish Documentation Maintenance Process
subtasks.description: Create a sustainable process for keeping documentation updated as the system evolves.
subtasks.details: Define documentation update triggers (e.g., code releases, API changes), establish ownership for different documentation sections, create documentation issue tracking process, set up regular review cycles, and implement feedback mechanisms for users to report documentation issues.
